# umyar — blog

> Personal blog by Umiar Iusupov. Posts in Russian, English and Portuguese on software, life, and notes worth keeping.

- Homepage: https://blog.umyar.com/
- RSS feed: https://blog.umyar.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://blog.umyar.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Author site: https://umyar.com
